description: Create a 'Method of Adjustment' psychophysics experiment in PsychoPy Builder where participants adjust the size of a square on the right to match a reference square on the left using the Up/Down arrow keys. The experiment requires a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/size_conditions.csv with at least 5 rows and columns for 'ref_size' and 'start_size'. Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/size_matching.psyexp. The experiment must include an instructions routine and a trial loop where a reference square's size is defined by 'ref_size' and an adjustable square's size is initialized by 'start_size'. The adjustable square must respond to real-time keyboard input for size changes, and the final adjusted size for each trial must be saved to the resulting data file.
